## Description

A clear and concise description of the bug.

## Steps to Reproduce

1. Run `stacklens analyze ...`
2. Observe the output

## Expected Behavior

What you expected to happen.

## Actual Behavior

What actually happened. Please include the full output or error message.

## Sample Log (if applicable)

```
Paste the log or stack trace you were analyzing here
```

## Environment

- OS: [e.g. Ubuntu 22.04, macOS 14, Windows 11]
- Java version: [e.g. Java 17.0.9]
- StackLens version: [e.g. 1.0.0]

## Additional Context

Any other context that might help diagnose the issue.
